song.title: Alpha And Omega
song.author: Erasmus Mutanbira
song.lyrics: [V1A] . Db Ebm/Db Db You are Alpha and Ome - ga . Ebm7 Db/Ab We worship You, our Lord . Ab Bbm7 Ab/C Db (1.) You are wor - thy to be praised (To V. 1a) . Ab Bbm7 Ab/C Db N.C. (2.) You are wor - thy to be praised (To Ch. 1a) Chorus 1a: . N.C. We give You all the glory . N.C. We worship You, our Lord . N.C. (1.) You are worthy to be praised (To Ch. 1a) . N.C. Db (2.) You are worthy to be praised (To V. 1b) [V1B] .Ebm7/Ab Db Ab2/C Db Ebm7 Db You are Alpha and O - me - ga .Db/F Gb Ebm7 Db/Ab We worship You, our Lord . Ab Bbm7 Ab/C Db You are wor - thy to be praised Chorus 1b: . F Bbm Ab Gb Db/F We give You all the glo - ry . Gb Ebm7 Db/Ab We worship You, our Lord . Ab Bbm7 Ab/C Ab Db You are wor - thy to be praised CCLI-Liednummer 4654148 CCLI-Lizenznummer 1289104
